title: Create+
description: Create and mods that make it better!
body:
Time to power up your brain and start **Creating**! Build **trains**, automated **farms**, fly **planes** & much **more**!

# What is this?
Adds **[Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric)**, it´s best addons & more quality-of-life mods.\

# Socials:
[Discord Server](https://discord.gg/2XzK42Dr5J)\
[Twitter / X](https://x.com/Jonkl7937)

### Create Addons:
[Create: Steam 'n' Rails](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-steam-n-rails), [Create Deco](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-deco), [Create: Armor Trims](https://modrinth.com/datapack/create-mod-trims/version/2.0.1), [Create: Copycats+](https://modrinth.com/mod/copycats), [Create Slice & Dice](https://modrinth.com/mod/slice-and-dice), [Create Man of Many Planes](https://modrinth.com/datapack/create-man-of-many-planes) ([+Immersive Aircraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft), [+Man Of Many Planes](https://modrinth.com/mod/man-of-many-planes)), [Create: Interiors](https://modrinth.com/mod/interiors), [Create: High Pressure](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-high-pressure), [Create Goggles](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-goggles), [Netherracked](https://modrinth.com/datapack/netherracked), [Create Jetpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-jetpack) and [Create Railways Navigator](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-railways-navigator), [Create: Dreams & Desires](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-dreams-and-desires), [Create Contraption Terminals](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-contraption-terminals), [Create Enchantment Industry Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-enchantment-industry-fabric) & [Create: Numismatics](https://modrinth.com/mod/numismatics), [Create: Copper & Zinc](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-copper-zinc)!

### Other Mods:
[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris), [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei), [Inventorio](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventorio), [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify), [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium),[Macaw's Furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-furniture), [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) + [Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap), [Chisel Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/chisel-reborn), [ReplayMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod), [Jade 🔍](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade),[Jade Addons (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade-addons-fabric), [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat), [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin), [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu), [Tom's Simple Storage Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage), [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra), [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports), [Borderless Mining](https://modrinth.com/mod/borderless-mining), [DnT](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns), [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith), [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic), +All needed APIs & libraries, optimization mods. (**Read the changelog** for all **Added/Removed** mods)

### Shaderpacks:
[Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined),
[Complementary Shaders - Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound),
[MakeUp - Ultra Fast](https://modrinth.com/shader/makeup-ultra-fast-shaders),
[Rethinking Voxels](https://modrinth.com/shader/rethinking-voxels), [BSL](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders)

### Legacy mods:
[Create: Power Loader (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-power-loader-fabric), [Whitelistd](https://modrinth.com/mod/whitelistd)

### Recourse Packs:
[Better Visible Ores](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-visible-ores)


# Supported versions:
**Fabric 1.20.1**\
[(**Forge 1.20.1**)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/create+neoforge)

# Issues:
Report bugs & issues to the [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/2XzK42Dr5J) or the [Issue Tracker](https://github.com/Not-Awake-Studios/Create/issues).
If you want to ask something, join [the discord](https://discord.gg/2XzK42Dr5J).


<details>
<summary>FAQ</summary>

Q: I **cannot generate superflat** worlds.\
A: **Disable Terralith** in the Modrinth app.

Q: How do I set this up on a server?\
A: Although the modpack won't work directly on a server, there is a zip containing all of the server-side mods on [the discord](https://discord.gg/2XzK42Dr5J)

</details>



# Loaders:
You need the Modrinth App to use the modpack. Not planning to add CurseForge support anytime soon.

### Made by [**Not Awake Studios**](https://modrinth.com/organization/NotAwakeStudios).
